classified.title: Madhabi Das vs Oriental Insurance Company Limited on 13 July, 2026
classified.reason: Individual motor accident compensation appeal enhancing lump-sum award to a claimant; applies existing precedent without laying down any principle of law binding on all MACTs/insurers.

gists.gist: In this suo motu matter arising from the Phalodi accident, the Court noted that only three States/UTs (Bihar, Karnataka, Puducherry) had filed compliance affidavits to its detailed 13 April 2026 road-safety directions, and directed that its orders be re-circulated to all concerned authorities, warning that defaulting States' Chief Secretaries and DGPs would be summoned to appear personally if affidavits are not filed within two weeks.
gists.latest_development: As of 13 July 2026, the Court warned that Chief Secretaries and DGPs of defaulting States/UTs will be summoned to appear personally if compliance affidavits are not filed within two weeks, and listed the matter for 17 August 2026.
